commits.message: ─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Update README with hero section and add ROADMAP.md    2 │    3 │ README changes:    4 │ - Add hero section: Problem, Approach, Outcome narrative    5 │ - Add badges for tests (1254), coverage (85%), Python, license    6 │ - Update architecture to reflect 21 organs    7 │ - Add workflow orchestration examples    8 │ - Add ritual chains documentation    9 │ - Add external bridges section   10 │ - Update project structure with new modules   11 │ - Fix repository URLs   12 │   13 │ New ROADMAP.md:   14 │ - Document completed phases (1-8)   15 │ - List in-progress work (Organ 22)   16 │ - Outline planned phases (9-15)   17 │ - Include future considerations   18 │ - Add version history   19 │   20 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Add RE:GE Enhancement Suite: bridges, orchestration, CLI improvements    2 │    3 │ Implements comprehensive enhancement plan across 5 phases:    4 │    5 │ Phase 1: Coverage Improvements    6 │ - test_cli_coverage.py: File I/O, exceptions, REPL testing    7 │ - test_models_coverage.py: Dataclass edge cases, serialization    8 │ - test_archive_order_coverage.py: Decay, search, version consolidation    9 │   10 │ Phase 2: CLI Improvements   11 │ - New command groups: laws, fusion, depth, queue, batch, bridge, chain   12 │ - Enhanced REPL with :help, :status, :organs, :modes, :vars, :history   13 │ - Output formatting module with YAML, CSV, table, color support   14 │   15 │ Phase 3: External Bridges   16 │ - Bridge infrastructure: base.py, registry.py, config.py   17 │ - Obsidian bridge: Fragment export/import with YAML frontmatter   18 │ - Git bridge: Hook installation, commit logging, branch validation   19 │ - Max/MSP bridge: OSC communication for audio/visual integration   20 │   21 │ Phase 4: API Documentation   22 │ - docs/api/organs.md, models.md: API reference   23 │ - docs/cli/commands.md: Complete CLI reference   24 │ - docs/bridges/: Obsidian, Git, Max/MSP setup guides   25 │ - docs/examples/: Basic invocation, ritual chains   26 │   27 │ Phase 5: Workflow Orchestration   28 │ - Phase, Branch, PhaseResult classes with condition helpers   29 │ - RitualChain for multi-step workflows with branching   30 │ - ChainExecution tracking with history and statistics   31 │ - RitualChainOrchestrator with step mode, compensation, dry run   32 │ - 6 built-in chains: canonization, contradiction, grief, emergency, bloom, lifecycle   33 │ - chain CLI commands: list, show, run, history, stats   34 │   35 │ Test results: 1254 tests passing, 85% coverage   36 │   37 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Bump lodash in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory
Fix Cursor Install MCP Server link (#173)

─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Add dynamic color themes and command help tools    2 │    3 │ New features:    4 │ - lolcat: Rainbow output (aliases: lc, lca, lcf)    5 │ - pywal: Image-based color themes for kitty/tmux    6 │ - navi: Interactive cheatsheet panel (Ctrl+G)    7 │ - tealdeer: Fast tldr client (aliases: tl, tldr-update)    8 │ - cheat.sh: cht() function with fzf integration    9 │ - theme-switch: Helper script for pywal theme management   10 │   11 │ Includes Fish shell equivalents for all tools.   12 │   13 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
